signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs, Triggering XRP Price Surge to $1
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs, Triggering XRP Price Surge to $1.42 in April 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]

The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit provides regulatory clarity, removing a multi-year overhang that suppressed XRP's price and enabling institutional adoption, with XRP gaining nearly 10% in the past week after breaking $1.50 resistance before settling at $1.42[1]
